summary: Excellent audience restoration of the 4/16/78 show featuring a pumped‑up Peggy‑O and a stellar Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain.
review: The three reviewers unanimously praise this 4/16/78 recording, highlighting the energized performance of "Peggy-O" and a superb "Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain" sequence. The tape, restored from Betty Dalton Miller Sirmick's audience source, is described as dynamic, clear and beautifully presented, making it a must‑listen for Deadheads.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are highly positive (4–5 stars), praising both the musical performance and the restored tape quality; limited to three reviews, confidence is medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Dynamic sounding tape, fully restored and beautiful; listeners note clarity and fidelity despite being an audience source.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe the show as a surprise gem with strong energy, noting especially the lifted feel of "Peggy-O" compared to earlier performances and a seamless Scarlet>Fire sequence.
